events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Based on the scenario, the evidence supports a **pass**: closeout photos show the EMT installation matching the referenced detail, with clearances, supports, labels, and terminations in place, and no open correction note on the inspection card — no defective, non-compliant, or degraded conditions were flagged. Risk is rated low, with a couple of standard follow-up actions noted (confirm conduit fill documentation per Ch. 9, and verify bend radius/360° rule per NEC 358.24/358.26 at final walk-down).
